home.hero_subtitle: Manage expenses, accounts, cards, wallets, and currencies — all in one place, offline and cloud-free.
home.features_subtitle: Built for those who want precision and privacy in their finances.
home.feature_accounts_desc: Cards, wallets, banks, and cash in one dashboard. Customizable colors and icons.
home.feature_debts_desc: Track what you owe and what's owed to you. Partial payments with editable history.
home.feature_investments_desc: Stocks, crypto, bonds, ETFs, and more. Automatic ROI and evolution charts.
home.feature_reports_desc: Category charts, monthly bars, net worth line, and rankings.
home.feature_offline_desc: No account, no cloud, no network permissions. Your data stays on your device.
home.feature_export_desc: Full backup to JSON. Take your data anywhere.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Install Mis Gastos directly on your Android device.
downloads.android_desc: Direct install. Google Play not required.
downloads.install_warning: Enable "Install from unknown sources" in Settings > Security before installing.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Explore everything Mis Gastos has to offer.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Guides, tutorials, and reference to get the most out of the app.
